---
title: "MPL Cambodia Season 6 — EDA"
subtitle: "A data-driven exploration of Southeast Asia's fastest-growing esports league"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib
sys.path.insert(0, str(pathlib.Path(".").resolve()))
import utils, pandas as pd, numpy as np

df  = utils.load_data()
ml  = utils.match_level(df)
```

::: {.hero-banner}

# 🎮 MPL Cambodia Season 6

**Mobile Legends Professional League Cambodia** — Season 6 is the premier competitive circuit for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang in Cambodia. Eight elite teams clashed across a full regular season and playoffs bracket to claim the national championship title and earn the right to represent Cambodia on the international stage.

This project performs a **complete Exploratory Data Analysis** of every match, every pick, every kill, and every gold coin earned across the tournament — translating raw game logs into clear, visual stories.

:::

---

## At a Glance

```{python}
#| echo: false
n_players   = df["Players"].nunique()
n_teams     = df["team_clean"].nunique()
n_matches   = df["Match"].nunique()
n_games     = df.groupby(["Match", "team_clean"]).ngroups // 2
avg_dur     = df.groupby(["Match", "team_clean"])["dur_min"].first().mean()
total_kills = df["K"].sum()
total_gold  = df["Gold"].sum()
top_mvp     = df.groupby("Players")["MVP"].sum().idxmax()

print(f"""
Teams      : {n_teams}
Players    : {n_players}
Matches    : {n_matches}
Avg. Duration : {avg_dur:.1f} min
Total Kills : {total_kills:,}
Total Gold  : {total_gold:,}
Top MVP     : {top_mvp}
""")
```

::: {.stat-grid}

::: {.stat-card}
[8]{.stat-number}
[Teams]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-card}
[202]{.stat-number}
[Players Tracked]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-card}
[6]{.stat-number}
[Unique Matches]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-card}
[1,010]{.stat-number}
[Player-Game Rows]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-card}
[~24 min]{.stat-number}
[Avg. Match Duration]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-card}
[8 Stages]{.stat-number}
[Tournament Phases]{.stat-label}
:::

:::

---

## What This Dataset Contains

The dataset is a **player-game-level** breakdown of every competitive match played in MPL Cambodia Season 6. Each row represents one player's performance in one game, giving us:

| Category | What's Captured |
|---|---|
| **Match metadata** | Date, stage, match ID, winning team |
| **Draft phase** | Hero picks, bans, role assignments |
| **Performance stats** | Kills, Deaths, Assists, Gold earned, Level |
| **Objectives** | Towers destroyed, Lord / Turtle / Buff captures |
| **Configuration** | Battle spells, emblems, and talent selections |

Because five players appear per team per game, every row is linked to exactly one match-team-game combination. This structure enables both **per-player analysis** and **per-team aggregations**.

---

## Tournament Structure

```{python}
#| label: fig-stage-bar
#| fig-cap: "Number of player-rows recorded per tournament stage (each game has 10 player rows)."
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

utils.apply_dark_theme()

stage_order = [
    "Regular Season",
    "Upper Bracket Quarterfinals",
    "Upper Bracket Semifinals",
    "Upper Bracket Final",
    "Lower Bracket Semifinal",
    "Lower Bracket Final",
    "5th place match",
    "Grand Final",
]
stage_counts = (
    df["Stage"]
    .value_counts()
    .reindex([s for s in stage_order if s in df["Stage"].unique()])
    .reset_index()
)
stage_counts.columns = ["Stage", "Count"]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
bars = ax.barh(
    stage_counts["Stage"][::-1],
    stage_counts["Count"][::-1],
    color=utils.PALETTE["primary"],
    edgecolor="none",
    height=0.6,
)
# Value labels
for bar in bars:
    w = bar.get_width()
    ax.text(
        w + 2, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height() / 2,
        f"{int(w):,}",
        va="center", ha="left",
        fontsize=9, color=utils.PALETTE["text"],
    )
ax.set_xlabel("Player-row count")
ax.set_title("Dataset Coverage by Tournament Stage", pad=12)
ax.set_xlim(0, stage_counts["Count"].max() * 1.15)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

::: {.insight-box}
**Reading the chart:** The Regular Season dominates row count because it spans the most games.
Playoff stages have fewer rows but typically contain the highest-intensity, longest matches with the most experienced rosters.
:::

---

## Analysis Roadmap

Navigate through the pages to follow the full EDA story:

| Page | Focus |
|---|---|
| [**Teams & Rosters**](teams.qmd) | Full team introductions, player roles, KDA, signature heroes |
| [**Dataset**](dataset.qmd) | Column definitions, data types, quality checks |
| [**Univariate**](univariate.qmd) | Distributions of match duration, kills, gold, and more |
| [**Bivariate**](bivariate.qmd) | Relationships between kills, gold, roles, and objectives |
| [**Insights**](insights.qmd) | Team standings, top players, MVP leaderboard |

---

*Data sourced from publicly available MPL Cambodia Season 6 match records.*
